parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
  "max_tokens": 512,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Classify this email reply into ONE of these categories:

1. POSITIVE - Interested, wants samples, wants to talk, asks questions about product
2. REFERRAL - Not the right person but refers to someone else
3. NOT_NOW - Interested but bad timing, ask to follow up later
4. OBJECTION - Has concerns but engagement shows interest (price, logistics, etc.)
5. NEGATIVE - Not interested, already has supplier, no need
6. UNSUBSCRIBE - Wants to be removed from list
7. OUT_OF_OFFICE - Auto-reply, OOO
8. BOUNCE - Delivery failure

Email reply:
From: {{ $json.from_name }} <{{ $json.from_email }}>
Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Body: {{ $json.body }}

Return JSON only:
{
  "category": "CATEGORY",
  "sentiment_score": 1-10,
  "summary": "one line summary",
  "suggested_action": "what should the sales team do next",
  "urgency": "high/medium/low",
  "referred_to": "name and email if referral, else null"
}"
    }
  ]
}
